TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ke-pen-ha-ken, title = Ke-pen-ha-ken, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ke-pen-ha-ken} }

S.FORM: == Ke-pen-ha-ken Śď•śú¨Śďąś†Ļ == likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ satabalay a nikilukan i laylayan nu Ke-pen-ha-ken itida i sabaw tusa a seci nu hedek, ayda a nikinkiwan tu nu sumama anika adihan, itida i kuo-wang nu putahan, i capi idaw ku nababalakian nu cacay a tabakiay nu patiyamay a luma', hakiya u cayseptusep mihcaan . nika hidaan makaadih tu cacay a tebungnan atu sumamad nu kiwkayan.makaadih aca tu ba'tu, saan i tawya idaw tu ku ba'tuan a zitay atu nu muenengay a tademaw. saan ku mikinkiway tu likisian, itida i wi-cin zitay, idaw t uku niyadu'. namaka sabaw cacay a sici nu lingatu, kapahay a minatu atu buting mahida misulutay tu tademaw atu pacakayan katayni i tini mueneng sa. aenengan mahida i Kan-men-e-se-te'-lan-de " Gammel Strand" capi. Gammel Strand)ťôĄŤŅĎ. cung-se-ci šł≠šłĖÁīÄ caycaywalnem mihcaan, ukiwsama ci U-e-pa-nuo san-se a cacay nu tigami: Ha-hun atu liklik a lalaan, u Dan-may kuo-wang ci Wa-e-de-ma yise sipabeli ci Luo-se-ci-le ukiwsama atu Lung-de satabakiay nu ukiwsama ci A-pu-sa-lung. mapatay satu ci A-pu-sa-lung, u zaysang nida mamin sipanukan ci Luo-se-ci-le ukiwsamaan. Caytusepsep mihcaan, Maliya a kiwkay patideng i tukay nu wali amis masaenalay a talakaway nu kitdaan, u liklik hamaw sa a macakad. 1186ŚĻī, . Ke-pen-ha-ken a ngangan sayaway a nika tahekalan i cudad, u namakayda i Sa-ke'-suo. Ke-la-ma-ti-ku'se a nisulitan " Dan-may-tademaw a naculilan", u La-tin-yi u "Portus Mercatorum", imi " pacakayan nu minatu", tawyaay a Da-may nisulitan u K√łbmandens Havn. nikadan sumad han tu ku ngangan u Ke-pen-ha-ken. itini i laylayan, patideng tu Ke-pen-ha-ken i caycaynempic mihcaan, uyni a mihcaan ci A-pu-sa-lung ukiwsama itidaa i cen-paw subal patideng tu sayaway a cen-pawan, i aydaay a kitidaan a Ke-li-se-ti-an-paw-kun. sapatideng tina cen-pawan u matalaway a taynin nu kukun a midebung. Wen-de a tademaw matenes ku nipidis, pesengen ku malumanay a cenpaw, u Ke-pen-ha-ken ku mikilulay. Portus Mercatorum, K√łbmandens Havn. . ayda ÁŹĺšĽ£ caywalsepcay mihcan sepat a bulad tusa a demiad, kaygung nu sakakaay ci Hay-te. Pa-ke' mililid tu Ing-ku balungaay a hitay mikuwan tu musaluimengay i Ke-pen-ha-ke micapiay tu Dan-may Nuo-wi balungaan. i nalimaan nida u sasinganganay a kaygung sakakaay ci Huo-lei-siw. Na-e-sun, mililid ci nida tu satapan a nipiedis, caay kedai nida ci Pa-ke' ku sakatadikud nu cudadan, yu amusaluemeng tu ku nikalepacawan, mapesu' ku yadahay nu Da-may Nuo-wi a bulungaan nu hitay. Ke-pen-ha-ken bayu a nikalepacawan saan u sa ngeluay nu Na-e-sun a nikalepacawan, milakuuyt tu Te'la-fa-e-cya a picidekan nikalepacawan. i caylimlunem a mihcaan, Ke-pen-ha-ken pacukeday tu tensukiw c Ke'-li-se-ti-an ese. caylimtulu mihcaan, misinzaay tu Lu-de-cun ci Fuo-lei-de-li-ke' ese lawaan nida ku Ke-pen-ha-ken, sisa misangan ku Ke-pen-ha-ken tu kaci a langant atu adawan sakaicelang miput tu tayniay nu mi'disay. caylimlunem mihcaan pitu a bulad, nani lawaan tu cacaya mihcaan, Ke-pen-ha-ken mikusang ci Ke-li-se-ti-an sanse, mahida pasaydaay i baluhay a palutatengaan. itida i sabaw enem a seci, Ke-pen-he-ken miida tu hinatayniay a He-lan nu balungaan atu Puo-luo-ti-hay niyaduan masasuini tu siwbay. ina tukay a Ke-li-se-duo-hu. Wa-e-ken-duo-hu u sitangahay a cen-ce-cya, matineng midiput tu misiwbayay, tu nikudan matineng pacakak tu sapacuwah. He-lan atu De-kuo amis pasayda namin tu baluhay tu palutatengaan. Śú®1536ŚĻīšĻčŚČć, . hatidaay nu enem a mihcan, Ing-kuo atu Dan-may malingatu aca malepacaw. caywalseppic mihcaan walu bulad sabaw enwm demiad katuku siwa bulad lima demiad mabakuhac aca tu sakatusa nu Ke-pen-ha-ken a nikalepacawan. amica sipakayda i Ing-kuo a musakamu, u Ke-pen-ha-ken ku ayaw mi'dis, u muktiki sapialawaca tu Da-may Nuo-wi a tabakiay nu balungaan. nika sipakayda i Da-may a tademaw atu Ke-pen-ha-ken binacadan a miadih, mahiniay a nikalepacawan. Ing-kuo a hitay u Kan-li-hu silamalay a lac uku cukaymasen pasayda i macimacian mibakudang, mahetik tabaki ku lamal. tawyaay a satabakiay nu kiwkay ci Maliya kiwkay mabakudang matuduh malawpes. saan ku sitangahay a likisi nu tademaw saan uyni a nikalepacawan u micapiay tu ayda a mihcaan nu sayaway a nikadesan a nipibakuhacan. nikudan milabu ku hitay nu Ing-kuo tulu a wangan nu tadeamw, lawa' hantu ku Ke-pen-ha-ken, taydan midebung mi'dis, tusa a malebut ku mapatayay nu binacadan, niyadu' mami a malekep mapesu'. Ke-pen-ha-ken a sakay lepacawan a tuud tada maluman tu, nu macapiay a lacuwan a hicaen tada batad ku nipikuwan caay paka demec tu Ing-kuo a hitayan. hedek satu sakatusa a nikalepacawan, idaw ku sananay u " taludu' kiyaku" a pabaluhay tu tukay nu sapatideng a kawawan itida i caysiwsippic mihcaan patideng, paicelang namaka macimacian duducsa tu maciay a dadan nu silamalay minayat tu lima a " taluduan" miduduc tu nipatideng tu luma' atu kakulian, tawya paluma tu ahebalay nu langdaway a lutulutukan. sapaini tu kawaw nu kanatal a nipicuduh atu kakulian nu tatayna, hamin nu macimacian patideng tu baluhay a cacudadan, mulaay a cacudadan, patideng tu sapiyundu a tuudan atu padekuan. . tusa a bataan katukuh enem a bataan nu mihcaan a secian, malalebu ku micudaday i tukay, Ke-li-se-ti-an-kan a Paw-de-se-man-de-se-te-lei-de hitay madebung nu taw, caysiwpiccay mihcaan siwa bulad itini patideng tu Ke'-li-se-ti-an-ni-ya sasiduma a tukay. 34 20šłĖÁīÄ60ŚĻīšĽ£śúę, . kilul sa macunus tu ku kadideng muculil, caysiwpictu mihcaan u basu tu ku midayliay tu laylay a ahemaway nu diki a kadideng. tusa a bataan a seci enem a bataan a seci malingatu, itida i nipatideng ni Yen. Kay-e a nakamuan, Ke-pen-ha-ken macian misangan tu caculilan atu sakalihalay makabatikal a dadanan. Ke-pen-ha-ken minatu mikilul tu kaygung mawada' a maenep. Ke-pen-ha-ken pahikukian misaahebal, mala tataydaan nu Pei-o, tusa a bataan katukuh i siwa a bataan nu mihcaan, minatu atu A-may-e- subal a nutipan patideng tu yadahay nu lalabinan. mala Hun-cya-tu-su-kun baluhay a lumeniay nu bunaw matatungtungduhay nu lumaan itida i caysiwsiwsiw mihcaan mitahan malingatu. 1999ŚĻīÁę£Ś∑•. sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü pisangaan tu sapayu a kusi nu Zuy-ten itida i Se-kan-ti-na-wi-ya a matatuntunduhay a lumaan, nu ayawan u Ke-pen-ha-ken a sangaw nu silamalay. mahida nu O-cuo a tuse, macimacian nu Ke-pen-ha-ken yadah ku miedapay a kakawaw, nalimaan a kawaw atu sasiwbayan a kawaw. i kitakit satabakiay nu banges a aadupan nu misangaay i " Ke-pen-ha-ken-maw-pi-ku-se" itida ku tadahunbu. kakulian tu ba'ketay itida nami i niyadu'an, ayda a mihcaan yadah ku kakulian palimadeng tayda i nutawan a niyadu'an, hakiya i hekalay nu kanatal. pasu Ke-pen-ha-ken a tuluay sasinganganay a bilu kakulian, idaw ku dumaay papilimaden patayda i Ze-de-lan-pan-daw. . saculil šļ§ťÄö amica ku Ke-pen-ha-ke itida i Dan-may a lilisan, nika u caculilan nu Dan-may. Kunlu atu dadan nu silamalay taneng busut sa tayda i O-cuo talu atu Pei-o a Se-ka-ti-na-wi-ya pantaw, E'-le' bayu' tabakiay a sangaw milakuuyt tu E'-le' bayu', mitulin tu Ke-pen-ha-ken atu Zui-ten-ma-e-muo, macimacian atu inaka idaw ku silamalay a sakalalitin, i macimacian idaw ku silamalay, idaw ku sapitulin tu Ke-pen-ha-ke atu biyaw a niyadu'an a niyadu'a nu silamalay. Ke-pen-ha-ken kanatal a pahikukian itida i Kay-se-cu-pu. tabakiay a balungan nu Ke-pen-ha-ken taneng mitulin tu Nuo-wi suotu a Aw-se-lu, Zuy-ten tukay He-e-sin-paw, Dan-may-kan-se-aw-hu-se, subal Puo-n-huo-e-mu.

bar~…ĺuńßaj tu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan. ********, . ńßatidaaj nu …ôn…ôm a mińß ¶an, iŇč-kuo atu dan-maj mar~…ĺiŇčatu a ¶a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. ¶ajwar~…ĺs…ôppi ¶ mińß ¶aan war~…ĺu bur~…ĺad sabaw …ônwm d…ômiad katuku siwa bur~…ĺad r~…ĺima d…ômiad mabakuńßa ¶ a ¶a tu sakatusa nu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. ami ¶a sipakajda i iŇč-kuo a musakamu, u k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn ku ajaw mi Ē~ °dis, u muktiki sapiar~…ĺawa ¶a tu da-maj nuo-wi a tabakiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan. nika sipakajda i da-maj a tad…ômaw atu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn bina ¶adan a miadińß, mańßiniaj a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. iŇč-kuo a ńßitaj u kan-r~…ĺi-ńßu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺa ¶ uku ¶ukajmas…ôn pasajda i ma ¶ima ¶ian mibakudaŇč, mańß…ôtik tabaki ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. tawjaaj a satabakiaj nu kiwkaj ¶i mar~…ĺija kiwkaj mabakudaŇč matuduńß mar~…ĺawp…ôs. saan ku sitaŇčańßaj a r~…ĺikisi nu tad…ômaw saan ujni a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan u mi ¶apiaj tu ajda a mińß ¶aan nu sajawaj a nikad…ôsan a nipibakuńßa ¶an. nikudan mir~…ĺabu ku ńßitaj nu iŇč-kuo tur~…ĺu a waŇčan nu tad…ôamw, r~…ĺawa Ē~ ° ńßantu ku k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn, tajdan mid…ôbuŇč mi Ē~ °dis, tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku mapatajaj nu bina ¶adan, nijadu Ē~ ° mami a mar~…ĺ…ôk…ôp map…ôsu Ē~ °. k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn a sakaj r~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a tuud tada mar~…ĺuman tu, nu ma ¶apiaj a r~…ĺa ¶uwan a ńßi ¶a…ôn tada batad ku nipikuwan ¶aaj paka d…ôm…ô ¶ tu iŇč-kuo a ńßitajan. ńß…ôd…ôk satu sakatusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, idaw ku sananaj u " tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° kijaku" a pabar~…ĺuńßaj tu tukaj nu sapatid…ôŇč a kawawan itida i ¶ajsiwsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan patid…ôŇč, pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč namaka ma ¶ima ¶ian dudu ¶sa tu ma ¶iaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj minajat tu r~…ĺima a " tar~…ĺuduan" midudu ¶ tu nipatid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu kakur~…ĺian, tawja par~…ĺuma tu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a r~…ĺutur~…ĺutukan. sapaini tu kawaw nu kanatar~…ĺ a nipi ¶uduńß atu kakur~…ĺian nu tatajna, ńßamin nu ma ¶ima ¶ian patid…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ¶a ¶udadan, mur~…ĺaaj a ¶a ¶udadan, patid…ôŇč tu sapijundu a tuudan atu pad…ôkuan. . tusa a bataan katukuńß …ôn…ôm a bataan nu mińß ¶aan a s…ô ¶ian, mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu ku mi ¶udadaj i tukaj, k…ô-r~…ĺi-s…ô-ti-an-kan a paw-d…ô-s…ô-man-d…ô-s…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺ…ôi-d…ô ńßitaj mad…ôbuŇč nu taw, ¶ajsiwpi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan siwa bur~…ĺad itini patid…ôŇč tu k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-s…ô-ti-an-ni-ja sasiduma a tukaj. ** *********, . kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa ma ¶unus tu ku kadid…ôŇč mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶ajsiwpi ¶tu mińß ¶aan u basu tu ku midajr~…ĺiaj tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a ańß…ômawaj nu diki a kadid…ôŇč. tusa a bataan a s…ô ¶i …ôn…ôm a bataan a s…ô ¶i mar~…ĺiŇčatu, itida i nipatid…ôŇč ni j…ôn. kaj-…ô a nakamuan, k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn ma ¶ian misaŇčan tu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan atu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj makabatikar~…ĺ a dadanan. k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn minatu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu kajguŇč mawada Ē~ ° a ma…ôn…ôp. k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn pańßikukian misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa tatajdaan nu p…ôi-o, tusa a bataan katukuńß i siwa a bataan nu mińß ¶aan, minatu atu a-maj-…ô- subar~…ĺ a nutipan patid…ôŇč tu jadańßaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan. mar~…ĺa ńßun- ¶ja-tu-su-kun bar~…ĺuńßaj a r~…ĺum…ôniaj nu bunaw matatuŇčtuŇčduńßaj nu r~…ĺumaan itida i ¶ajsiwsiwsiw mińß ¶aan mitańßan mar~…ĺiŇčatu. *******. sakaudip ** pisaŇčaan tu sapaju a kusi nu zuj-t…ôn itida i s…ô-kan-ti-na-wi-ja a matatuntunduńßaj a r~…ĺumaan, nu ajawan u k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn a saŇčaw nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj. mańßida nu o- ¶uo a tus…ô, ma ¶ima ¶ian nu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn jadańß ku mi…ôdapaj a kakawaw, nar~…ĺimaan a kawaw atu sasiwbajan a kawaw. i kitakit satabakiaj nu baŇč…ôs a aadupan nu misaŇčaaj i " k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn-maw-pi-ku-s…ô" itida ku tadańßunbu. kakur~…ĺian tu ba Ē~ °k…ôtaj itida nami i nijadu Ē~ °an, ajda a mińß ¶aan jadańß ku kakur~…ĺian par~…ĺimad…ôŇč tajda i nutawan a nijadu Ē~ °an, ńßakija i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu kanatar~…ĺ. pasu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn a tur~…ĺuaj sasiŇčaŇčanaj a bir~…ĺu kakur~…ĺian, idaw ku dumaaj papir~…ĺimad…ôn patajda i z…ô-d…ô-r~…ĺan-pan-daw. . sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ** ami ¶a ku k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ô itida i dan-maj a r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, nika u ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu dan-maj. kunr~…ĺu atu dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj tan…ôŇč busut sa tajda i o- ¶uo tar~…ĺu atu p…ôi-o a s…ô-ka-ti-na-wi-ja pantaw, …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° baju Ē~ ° tabakiaj a saŇčaw mir~…ĺakuujt tu …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° baju Ē~ °, mitur~…ĺin tu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn atu zui-t…ôn-ma-…ô-muo, ma ¶ima ¶ian atu inaka idaw ku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a sakar~…ĺar~…ĺitin, i ma ¶ima ¶ian idaw ku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, idaw ku sapitur~…ĺin tu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ô atu bijaw a nijadu Ē~ °an a nijadu Ē~ °a nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj. k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn kanatar~…ĺ a pańßikukian itida i kaj-s…ô- ¶u-pu. tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇčan nu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn tan…ôŇč mitur~…ĺin tu nuo-wi suotu a aw-s…ô-r~…ĺu, zuj-t…ôn tukaj ńß…ô-…ô-sin-paw, dan-maj-kan-s…ô-aw-ńßu-s…ô, subar~…ĺ puo-n-ńßuo-…ô-mu.
S.FORM: == Ke-pen-ha-ken Śď•śú¨Śďąś†Ļ == likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ satabalay a nikilukan i laylayan nu Ke-pen-ha-ken itida i sabaw tusa a seci nu hedek, ayda a nikinkiwan tu nu sumama anika adihan, itida i kuo-wang nu putahan, i capi idaw ku nababalakian nu cacay a tabakiay nu patiyamay a luma', hakiya u cayseptusep mihcaan . nika hidaan makaadih tu cacay a tebungnan atu sumamad nu kiwkayan.makaadih aca tu ba'tu, saan i tawya idaw tu ku ba'tuan a zitay atu nu muenengay a tademaw. saan ku mikinkiway tu likisian, itida i wi-cin zitay, idaw t uku niyadu'. namaka sabaw cacay a sici nu lingatu, kapahay a minatu atu buting mahida misulutay tu tademaw atu pacakayan katayni i tini mueneng sa. aenengan mahida i Kan-men-e-se-te'-lan-de " Gammel Strand" capi. Gammel Strand)ťôĄŤŅĎ. cung-se-ci šł≠šłĖÁīÄ caycaywalnem mihcaan, ukiwsama ci U-e-pa-nuo san-se a cacay nu tigami: Ha-hun atu liklik a lalaan, u Dan-may kuo-wang ci Wa-e-de-ma yise sipabeli ci Luo-se-ci-le ukiwsama atu Lung-de satabakiay nu ukiwsama ci A-pu-sa-lung. mapatay satu ci A-pu-sa-lung, u zaysang nida mamin sipanukan ci Luo-se-ci-le ukiwsamaan. Caytusepsep mihcaan, Maliya a kiwkay patideng i tukay nu wali amis masaenalay a talakaway nu kitdaan, u liklik hamaw sa a macakad. 1186ŚĻī, . Ke-pen-ha-ken a ngangan sayaway a nika tahekalan i cudad, u namakayda i Sa-ke'-suo. Ke-la-ma-ti-ku'se a nisulitan " Dan-may-tademaw a naculilan", u La-tin-yi u "Portus Mercatorum", imi " pacakayan nu minatu", tawyaay a Da-may nisulitan u K√łbmandens Havn. nikadan sumad han tu ku ngangan u Ke-pen-ha-ken. itini i laylayan, patideng tu Ke-pen-ha-ken i caycaynempic mihcaan, uyni a mihcaan ci A-pu-sa-lung ukiwsama itidaa i cen-paw subal patideng tu sayaway a cen-pawan, i aydaay a kitidaan a Ke-li-se-ti-an-paw-kun. sapatideng tina cen-pawan u matalaway a taynin nu kukun a midebung. Wen-de a tademaw matenes ku nipidis, pesengen ku malumanay a cenpaw, u Ke-pen-ha-ken ku mikilulay. Portus Mercatorum, K√łbmandens Havn. . ayda ÁŹĺšĽ£ caywalsepcay mihcan sepat a bulad tusa a demiad, kaygung nu sakakaay ci Hay-te. Pa-ke' mililid tu Ing-ku balungaay a hitay mikuwan tu musaluimengay i Ke-pen-ha-ke micapiay tu Dan-may Nuo-wi balungaan. i nalimaan nida u sasinganganay a kaygung sakakaay ci Huo-lei-siw. Na-e-sun, mililid ci nida tu satapan a nipiedis, caay kedai nida ci Pa-ke' ku sakatadikud nu cudadan, yu amusaluemeng tu ku nikalepacawan, mapesu' ku yadahay nu Da-may Nuo-wi a bulungaan nu hitay. Ke-pen-ha-ken bayu a nikalepacawan saan u sa ngeluay nu Na-e-sun a nikalepacawan, milakuuyt tu Te'la-fa-e-cya a picidekan nikalepacawan. i caylimlunem a mihcaan, Ke-pen-ha-ken pacukeday tu tensukiw c Ke'-li-se-ti-an ese. caylimtulu mihcaan, misinzaay tu Lu-de-cun ci Fuo-lei-de-li-ke' ese lawaan nida ku Ke-pen-ha-ken, sisa misangan ku Ke-pen-ha-ken tu kaci a langant atu adawan sakaicelang miput tu tayniay nu mi'disay. caylimlunem mihcaan pitu a bulad, nani lawaan tu cacaya mihcaan, Ke-pen-ha-ken mikusang ci Ke-li-se-ti-an sanse, mahida pasaydaay i baluhay a palutatengaan. itida i sabaw enem a seci, Ke-pen-he-ken miida tu hinatayniay a He-lan nu balungaan atu Puo-luo-ti-hay niyaduan masasuini tu siwbay. ina tukay a Ke-li-se-duo-hu. Wa-e-ken-duo-hu u sitangahay a cen-ce-cya, matineng midiput tu misiwbayay, tu nikudan matineng pacakak tu sapacuwah. He-lan atu De-kuo amis pasayda namin tu baluhay tu palutatengaan. Śú®1536ŚĻīšĻčŚČć, . hatidaay nu enem a mihcan, Ing-kuo atu Dan-may malingatu aca malepacaw. caywalseppic mihcaan walu bulad sabaw enwm demiad katuku siwa bulad lima demiad mabakuhac aca tu sakatusa nu Ke-pen-ha-ken a nikalepacawan. amica sipakayda i Ing-kuo a musakamu, u Ke-pen-ha-ken ku ayaw mi'dis, u muktiki sapialawaca tu Da-may Nuo-wi a tabakiay nu balungaan. nika sipakayda i Da-may a tademaw atu Ke-pen-ha-ken binacadan a miadih, mahiniay a nikalepacawan. Ing-kuo a hitay u Kan-li-hu silamalay a lac uku cukaymasen pasayda i macimacian mibakudang, mahetik tabaki ku lamal. tawyaay a satabakiay nu kiwkay ci Maliya kiwkay mabakudang matuduh malawpes. saan ku sitangahay a likisi nu tademaw saan uyni a nikalepacawan u micapiay tu ayda a mihcaan nu sayaway a nikadesan a nipibakuhacan. nikudan milabu ku hitay nu Ing-kuo tulu a wangan nu tadeamw, lawa' hantu ku Ke-pen-ha-ken, taydan midebung mi'dis, tusa a malebut ku mapatayay nu binacadan, niyadu' mami a malekep mapesu'. Ke-pen-ha-ken a sakay lepacawan a tuud tada maluman tu, nu macapiay a lacuwan a hicaen tada batad ku nipikuwan caay paka demec tu Ing-kuo a hitayan. hedek satu sakatusa a nikalepacawan, idaw ku sananay u " taludu' kiyaku" a pabaluhay tu tukay nu sapatideng a kawawan itida i caysiwsippic mihcaan patideng, paicelang namaka macimacian duducsa tu maciay a dadan nu silamalay minayat tu lima a " taluduan" miduduc tu nipatideng tu luma' atu kakulian, tawya paluma tu ahebalay nu langdaway a lutulutukan. sapaini tu kawaw nu kanatal a nipicuduh atu kakulian nu tatayna, hamin nu macimacian patideng tu baluhay a cacudadan, mulaay a cacudadan, patideng tu sapiyundu a tuudan atu padekuan. . tusa a bataan katukuh enem a bataan nu mihcaan a secian, malalebu ku micudaday i tukay, Ke-li-se-ti-an-kan a Paw-de-se-man-de-se-te-lei-de hitay madebung nu taw, caysiwpiccay mihcaan siwa bulad itini patideng tu Ke'-li-se-ti-an-ni-ya sasiduma a tukay. 34 20šłĖÁīÄ60ŚĻīšĽ£śúę, . kilul sa macunus tu ku kadideng muculil, caysiwpictu mihcaan u basu tu ku midayliay tu laylay a ahemaway nu diki a kadideng. tusa a bataan a seci enem a bataan a seci malingatu, itida i nipatideng ni Yen. Kay-e a nakamuan, Ke-pen-ha-ken macian misangan tu caculilan atu sakalihalay makabatikal a dadanan. Ke-pen-ha-ken minatu mikilul tu kaygung mawada' a maenep. Ke-pen-ha-ken pahikukian misaahebal, mala tataydaan nu Pei-o, tusa a bataan katukuh i siwa a bataan nu mihcaan, minatu atu A-may-e- subal a nutipan patideng tu yadahay nu lalabinan. mala Hun-cya-tu-su-kun baluhay a lumeniay nu bunaw matatungtungduhay nu lumaan itida i caysiwsiwsiw mihcaan mitahan malingatu. 1999ŚĻīÁę£Ś∑•. sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü pisangaan tu sapayu a kusi nu Zuy-ten itida i Se-kan-ti-na-wi-ya a matatuntunduhay a lumaan, nu ayawan u Ke-pen-ha-ken a sangaw nu silamalay. mahida nu O-cuo a tuse, macimacian nu Ke-pen-ha-ken yadah ku miedapay a kakawaw, nalimaan a kawaw atu sasiwbayan a kawaw. i kitakit satabakiay nu banges a aadupan nu misangaay i " Ke-pen-ha-ken-maw-pi-ku-se" itida ku tadahunbu. kakulian tu ba'ketay itida nami i niyadu'an, ayda a mihcaan yadah ku kakulian palimadeng tayda i nutawan a niyadu'an, hakiya i hekalay nu kanatal. pasu Ke-pen-ha-ken a tuluay sasinganganay a bilu kakulian, idaw ku dumaay papilimaden patayda i Ze-de-lan-pan-daw. . saculil šļ§ťÄö amica ku Ke-pen-ha-ke itida i Dan-may a lilisan, nika u caculilan nu Dan-may. Kunlu atu dadan nu silamalay taneng busut sa tayda i O-cuo talu atu Pei-o a Se-ka-ti-na-wi-ya pantaw, E'-le' bayu' tabakiay a sangaw milakuuyt tu E'-le' bayu', mitulin tu Ke-pen-ha-ken atu Zui-ten-ma-e-muo, macimacian atu inaka idaw ku silamalay a sakalalitin, i macimacian idaw ku silamalay, idaw ku sapitulin tu Ke-pen-ha-ke atu biyaw a niyadu'an a niyadu'a nu silamalay. Ke-pen-ha-ken kanatal a pahikukian itida i Kay-se-cu-pu. tabakiay a balungan nu Ke-pen-ha-ken taneng mitulin tu Nuo-wi suotu a Aw-se-lu, Zuy-ten tukay He-e-sin-paw, Dan-may-kan-se-aw-hu-se, subal Puo-n-huo-e-mu.
S.PHON: == k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn **** == r~…ĺikisi ** satabar~…ĺaj a nikir~…ĺukan i r~…ĺajr~…ĺajan nu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn itida i sabaw tusa a s…ô ¶i nu ńß…ôd…ôk, ajda a nikinkiwan tu nu sumama anika t…ôbuŇčnan atu sumamad nu kiwkajan.makaadińß a ¶a tu ba Ē~ °tu, saan i tawja idaw tu ku ba Ē~ °tuan a zitaj atu nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw. saan ku mikinkiwaj tu r~…ĺikisian, itida i wi- ¶in zitaj, dan-maj-tad…ômaw a na ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan", u r~…ĺa-tin-ji u "portus m…ôr ¶atorum", imi " pa ¶akajan nu minatu", tawjaaj a da-maj nisur~…ĺitan u k*bmand…ôns ńßa*n. nikadan sumad ńßan tu ku ŇčaŇčan u bar~…ĺuńßaj tu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan. ********, . ńßatidaaj nu …ôn…ôm a mińß ¶an, iŇč-kuo atu dan-maj mar~…ĺiŇčatu a ¶a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. ¶ajwar~…ĺs…ôppi ¶ mińß ¶aan war~…ĺu bur~…ĺad sabaw …ônwm d…ômiad katuku siwa bur~…ĺad r~…ĺima d…ômiad mabakuńßa ¶ a ¶a tu sakatusa nu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. ami ¶a sipakajda i iŇč-kuo a musakamu, u k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn ku ajaw mi Ē~ °dis, u muktiki sapiar~…ĺawa ¶a tu da-maj nuo-wi a tabakiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan. nika sipakajda i da-maj a tad…ômaw atu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn bina ¶adan a miadińß, mańßiniaj a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. iŇč-kuo a ńßitaj u kan-r~…ĺi-ńßu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺa ¶ uku ¶ukajmas…ôn pasajda i ma ¶ima ¶ian mibakudaŇč, mańß…ôtik tabaki ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. tawjaaj a satabakiaj nu kiwkaj ¶i mar~…ĺija kiwkaj mabakudaŇč matuduńß mar~…ĺawp…ôs. saan ku sitaŇčańßaj a r~…ĺikisi nu tad…ômaw saan ujni a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan u mi ¶apiaj tu ajda a mińß ¶aan nu sajawaj a nikad…ôsan a nipibakuńßa ¶an. nikudan mir~…ĺabu ku ńßitaj nu iŇč-kuo tur~…ĺu a waŇčan nu tad…ôamw, r~…ĺawa Ē~ ° ńßantu ku k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn, tajdan mid…ôbuŇč mi Ē~ °dis, tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku mapatajaj nu bina ¶adan, nijadu Ē~ ° mami a mar~…ĺ…ôk…ôp map…ôsu Ē~ °. k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn a sakaj r~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a tuud tada mar~…ĺuman tu, nu ma ¶apiaj a r~…ĺa ¶uwan a ńßi ¶a…ôn tada batad ku nipikuwan ¶aaj paka d…ôm…ô ¶ tu iŇč-kuo a ńßitajan. ńß…ôd…ôk satu sakatusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, idaw ku sananaj u " tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° kijaku" a pabar~…ĺuńßaj tu tukaj nu sapatid…ôŇč a kawawan itida i ¶ajsiwsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan patid…ôŇč, pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč namaka ma ¶ima ¶ian dudu ¶sa tu ma ¶iaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj minajat tu r~…ĺima a " tar~…ĺuduan" midudu ¶ tu nipatid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu kakur~…ĺian, tawja par~…ĺuma tu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a r~…ĺutur~…ĺutukan. sapaini tu kawaw nu kanatar~…ĺ a nipi ¶uduńß atu kakur~…ĺian nu tatajna, ńßamin nu ma ¶ima ¶ian patid…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ¶a ¶udadan, mur~…ĺaaj a ¶a ¶udadan, patid…ôŇč tu sapijundu a tuudan atu pad…ôkuan. . tusa a bataan katukuńß …ôn…ôm a bataan nu mińß ¶aan a s…ô ¶ian, mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu ku mi ¶udadaj i tukaj, k…ô-r~…ĺi-s…ô-ti-an-kan a paw-d…ô-s…ô-man-d…ô-s…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺ…ôi-d…ô ńßitaj mad…ôbuŇč nu taw, ¶ajsiwpi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan siwa bur~…ĺad itini patid…ôŇč tu k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-s…ô-ti-an-ni-ja sasiduma a tukaj. ** *********, . kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa ma ¶unus tu ku kadid…ôŇč mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶ajsiwpi ¶tu mińß ¶aan u basu tu ku midajr~…ĺiaj tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a ańß…ômawaj nu diki a kadid…ôŇč. tusa a bataan a s…ô ¶i …ôn…ôm a bataan a s…ô ¶i mar~…ĺiŇčatu, itida i nipatid…ôŇč ni j…ôn. kaj-…ô a nakamuan, k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn ma ¶ian misaŇčan tu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan atu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj makabatikar~…ĺ a dadanan. k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn minatu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu kajguŇč mawada Ē~ ° a ma…ôn…ôp. k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn pańßikukian misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa tatajdaan nu p…ôi-o, tusa a bataan katukuńß i siwa a bataan nu mińß ¶aan, minatu atu a-maj-…ô- subar~…ĺ a nutipan patid…ôŇč tu jadańßaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan. mar~…ĺa ńßun- ¶ja-tu-su-kun bar~…ĺuńßaj a r~…ĺum…ôniaj nu bunaw matatuŇčtuŇčduńßaj nu r~…ĺumaan itida i ¶ajsiwsiwsiw mińß ¶aan mitańßan mar~…ĺiŇčatu. *******. sakaudip ** pisaŇčaan tu sapaju a kusi nu zuj-t…ôn itida i s…ô-kan-ti-na-wi-ja a matatuntunduńßaj a r~…ĺumaan, nu ajawan u k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn a saŇčaw nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj. mańßida nu o- ¶uo a tus…ô, ma ¶ima ¶ian nu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn jadańß ku mi…ôdapaj a kakawaw, nar~…ĺimaan a kawaw atu sasiwbajan a kawaw. i kitakit satabakiaj nu baŇč…ôs a aadupan nu misaŇčaaj i " k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn-maw-pi-ku-s…ô" itida ku tadańßunbu. kakur~…ĺian tu ba Ē~ °k…ôtaj itida nami i nijadu Ē~ °an, ajda a mińß ¶aan jadańß ku kakur~…ĺian par~…ĺimad…ôŇč tajda i nutawan a nijadu Ē~ °an, ńßakija i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu kanatar~…ĺ. pasu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn a tur~…ĺuaj sasiŇčaŇčanaj a bir~…ĺu kakur~…ĺian, idaw ku dumaaj papir~…ĺimad…ôn patajda i z…ô-d…ô-r~…ĺan-pan-daw. . sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ** ami ¶a ku k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ô itida i dan-maj a r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, nika u ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu dan-maj. kunr~…ĺu atu dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj tan…ôŇč busut sa tajda i o- ¶uo tar~…ĺu atu p…ôi-o a s…ô-ka-ti-na-wi-ja pantaw, …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° baju Ē~ ° tabakiaj a saŇčaw mir~…ĺakuujt tu …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ ° baju Ē~ °, mitur~…ĺin tu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn atu zui-t…ôn-ma-…ô-muo, ma ¶ima ¶ian atu inaka idaw ku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a sakar~…ĺar~…ĺitin, i ma ¶ima ¶ian idaw ku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, idaw ku sapitur~…ĺin tu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ô atu bijaw a nijadu Ē~ °an a nijadu Ē~ °a nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj. k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn kanatar~…ĺ a pańßikukian itida i kaj-s…ô- ¶u-pu. tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇčan nu k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn tan…ôŇč mitur~…ĺin tu nuo-wi suotu a aw-s…ô-r~…ĺu, zuj-t…ôn tukaj ńß…ô-…ô-sin-paw, dan-maj-kan-s…ô-aw-ńßu-s…ô, subar~…ĺ puo-n-ńßuo-…ô-mu.
